disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Reliever (short-acting bronchodilator) response is failing — escalating to every 2 hours today with diminishing effect
trigger_question_examples: How often are you using your blue puffer and is it helping?
Is the reliever still working when you take it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been taking the blue puffer about every two hours all day and it's just not fixing it anymore.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Speaking in short phrases / breathless after minimal exertion — marker of exacerbation severity
trigger_question_examples: Can you speak in full sentences right now?
How far can you walk before you get puffed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I can only get a few words out at a time, and walking across the flat leaves me really puffed.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Night-time awakenings from cough/wheeze on three consecutive nights — recent loss of baseline control
trigger_question_examples: Has this been waking you at night?
How have the last few nights been?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've been waking up coughing and wheezing the last three nights.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Preventer inhaler taken irregularly (non-adherent) — modifiable contributor to loss of control
trigger_question_examples: Do you take your brown preventer puffer every day?
How do you go with the preventer inhaler?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I don't take the brown one every day — only when I feel bad.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't really think the brown one does much, so I skip it a lot.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Dust aeroallergen exposure earlier today (visible dust in bedroom) — likely trigger
trigger_question_examples: Were you around anything that usually sets your asthma off?
Any dust, smoke, pets or cold air today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The bedroom was pretty dusty earlier today when I was sorting things out.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Lives alone with no one present overnight — reduced capacity to detect and respond to rapid deterioration
trigger_question_examples: Is there anyone with you at home tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's just me here — I live on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no purulent sputum, no pleuritic chest pain, no calf swelling — pertinent negatives against infective or embolic mimics
trigger_question_examples: Any sharp chest pain on breathing in, or swelling in one leg?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, the cough is dry with no coloured phlegm, no sharp pain, and my legs are fine.
